pi_items.source: setup_offset_task.sh lines 13-24; Both URLs tested and working. Fallback uses ImageMagick convert command to create synthetic test pattern.

privileged_info_summary: The offset_image task applies a 150-pixel rightward and 100-pixel downward offset to an 800x600 JPEG image downloaded from Unsplash with wrap-around enabled using NumPy's roll function. The verifier compares the result against a reference offset image using SSIM with a 0.95 threshold. Original image sources are real Unsplash photos (verified downloads: 800x600 and 800x608 pixels). Dimensions are preserved through wrap-around. Task has 90-second timeout and 7-step limit with sparse reward.
